reviews.comment:
La atención de la confitería es pésima, no así la estación de servicio. Mala onda, desgano. Pasamos el domingo pasado cerca de las 11 a desayunar. Ocupados con el teléfono, ni servilletas nos alcanzaron.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the pastry shop is terrible, unlike at the gas station. Bad vibes, lack of enthusiasm. We stopped by last Sunday around 11 am for breakfast. They were so busy on their phones they didn't even give us napkins.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtMmNhdUF3EAE
